brief: Police release a suspect in the Widdecombe murder case as Spain battles deadly wildfires, McConnell's health remains unclear, and a new dinosaur species is discovered. Research highlights visual analytics for missing data and AI-assisted crime linkage, alongside advances in brain-computer interfaces and sign language recognition.
news_summary: A man arrested on suspicion of Ann Widdecombe's murder is released; Spain's wildfire kills at least 12, including four Britons; Mitch McConnell's health questions persist; a Dreyfus statue gets a permanent home in Paris; and a new dinosaur species is found in Thailand.
papers_summary: ImputeViz provides a dashboard for missing data diagnosis, while a study examines how analysts use AI in crime linkage. Other papers cover brain-computer interface trials in China, a smart glove for sign language recognition, and visual analytics for traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Police release a suspect in the Widdecombe murder case as Spain battles deadly wildfires, McConnell's health remains unclear, and a new dinosaur species is discovered. Research highlights visual analytics for missing data and AI-assisted crime linkage, alongside advances in brain-computer interfaces and sign language recognition.
en.news_summary: A man arrested on suspicion of Ann Widdecombe's murder is released; Spain's wildfire kills at least 12, including four Britons; Mitch McConnell's health questions persist; a Dreyfus statue gets a permanent home in Paris; and a new dinosaur species is found in Thailand.
en.papers_summary: ImputeViz provides a dashboard for missing data diagnosis, while a study examines how analysts use AI in crime linkage. Other papers cover brain-computer interface trials in China, a smart glove for sign language recognition, and visual analytics for traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 颱風巴威侵襲台灣與中國東南沿海，造成大規模停電和人員撤離。德國華人跨國性侵案宣判，揭露隱密的性暴力網絡。國際研究持續關注AI成本、人機互動與犯罪分析。
zh.news_summary: 颱風巴威導致台灣15萬戶停電，中國三地撤離逾76萬人；德國宣判一宗由中國籍男性主導的Telegram跨國性侵案，核心成員落網。
zh.papers_summary: 今日研究聚焦於AI在犯罪連結分析中的應用、遺漏資料視覺化診斷，以及腦機介面在中國的臨床轉譯等領域。

todays_image.caption: Ancient bones in a museum and a murder investigation both involve cold cases, but only one is truly extinct.
todays_image.title: Hall of Dinosaurs and Fossil Reptiles, Museum of Natural History
